data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of suspending grants without uninstalling the extension. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm this capability exists. The linked use case mentions the need for this functionality but lacks specific evidence to demonstrate that it has been implemented, indicating a clear gap in the validation process.
gaps: No evidence confirming the ability to suspend grants without uninstalling the extension.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the ability to suspend grants.
